channel.title: OVHcloud on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in OVHcloud on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Using OVHcloud VPS as a Dedicated Backup Server
item.description: Automate backups of OVHcloud servers to Object Storage using a dedicated VPS.

item.title: Backing Up an OVHcloud Managed PostgreSQL Database
item.description: Backing up an OVHcloud Managed PostgreSQL database to Object Storage using pg_dump and Plakar.
